title: Automation Organizational Groups
excerpt: The ability to group automations in the  automations screen, and collapse them, would be useful. If i have a certain set of automations related to a part of the workflow, to put them in one group so I can easily find the…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to group automations in the automations screen, and collapse them, would be useful. If i have a certain set of automations related to a part of the workflow, to put them in one group so I can easily find them would save a lot of time looking for the correct automation.

posts.author: NickNourishandSow (Nick Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 - this would be an awesome feature. Especially useful for when automation lists get long with more complex flows. The description field is a nice plus, but having the ability to organize related automations/automations that work together for a certain process would be a huge plus. Then, editing or adding additional automations would be a breeze.
